transformationMoves: Replace conceptual summary with live physical evidence at thresholds and exits.
Convert mechanism shorthand into field-usable contact language without flattening the cadence.
Make logistics, ship labor, and palace geometry arrive through immediate sensory reads instead of labeled process.
Keep every addition POV-filtered so Jaina reads pattern through body and craft while Sylvanas reads exposure through route, cover, and posture.

scenes.title: The Handoff
scenes.biggestGap: The camp handoff is strong until the treatment threshold and camp exit lift into summary or future projection.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Baelgun's snow-cut camp and the switchback back toward Daggercap Bay.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Hide flaps, stretcher leather, buckets, forge heat, tar on the remembered harbor line.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina keeps hearing the hitch and cannot let warmth interrupt the one usable thing the cave left her.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Baelgun's orders and the handoff happen through stretcher weight, flap movement, and wind.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The return road resolves into the actual switchback and harbor facts, not a projected future position.

scenes.title: The Return March
scenes.biggestGap: Jaina's Kel'Thuzad recognition and three-school explanation drift briefly into polished mechanism language.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Open Dragonblight bone-country under snow glare and killing wind.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Powder snow, blood on the lip, shaking hands, mare leather, crusted lashes.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina translates the seam through bodily cost and magical pattern-recognition, never neutral explanation.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: The three-school line must sound like something she can gasp into the road and the others can use.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The march carries the framework toward Daggercap rather than suspending it in theory.

scenes.title: Daggercap and the Crossing
scenes.biggestGap: The harbor return and ship handling occasionally compress into verdicts and labeled seamanship instead of live deck labor.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Ruined Daggercap harbor, then the Wolfheart's working deck, then Southshore landfall.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Pilings, handspikes, ropes, spray-slick rail, blood on deck grain, nets drying ashore.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads every location by whether it can still carry warning or spellwork.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Antonidas, Dagny, and Sylvanas stay tied to stone-light, deck orders, rope, and rail.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Landfall stays ordinary in visible civic terms while proving no one fortified the inland road.

scenes.title: The Road South
scenes.biggestGap: The relay update names useful timing, then slips into a personified palace instead of lived guard habit.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Harvest villages and the King's Road tightening toward Capital City.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Hot brass cylinder, village ribbons, reins, road dust, blue stone-light.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the kingdom's false calm as route failure, guard habit, and wasted time.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Each exchange rides in saddle posture, relay handoff, or stone-light fatigue.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Antonidas's service-arch promise keeps the chapter moving toward a physical palace margin.

scenes.title: The Plan and the Capital
scenes.biggestGap: Sylvanas's throne-room read briefly sounds like planning notes instead of a body pricing exposure on palace stone.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Eastern service arch, palace side court, service passage, throne-room memory-map beyond it.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cold marble, lock plate, old metal, mortar, service-door crack, flower paste at the gate.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reduces the room to kill angles, lack of cover, and whether her body can buy the seconds.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Plan talk stays tied to wall, lock, dawn light, and the faces hearing the cost.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The service door closes on the last outside help and leaves only passage stone ahead.
